channel.title: NDTV News Search Records Found 1000
channel.description: NDTV.com provides the latest information from and in-depth coverage of India and the world. Find breaking news, India news, top stories, elections, politics, business, cricket, movies, lifestyle, health, live TV, videos, photos and more.

item.title: "Big Week Of Conversations, Connections": Australian Envoy On PM Modi's Visit

media:content.media:description: PM Modi is set to arrive in Australia's Melbourne on Wednesday night, local time.

item.description: Philip Green stated that Australia is looking forward to have more cooperation with India in sports, arts and culture.
item.content:encoded: Philip Green stated that Australia is looking forward to have more cooperation with India in sports, arts and culture.

item.title: 6,000 Seafarers Stranded In Persian Gulf Amid Fresh UN-Iran Tensions

media:content.media:description: Iran has struck at least three ships in recent days.

item.description: US President Donald Trump earlier Wednesday said the US-Iran ceasefire was over, though he left the door open to more talks, after fighting sparked by Iranian attacks on ships in the vital Strait of Hormuz.
item.content:encoded: US President Donald Trump earlier Wednesday said the US-Iran ceasefire was over, though he left the door open to more talks, after fighting sparked by Iranian attacks on ships in the vital Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: Sri Lanka To Convert Hospital Into Prison After Deadly Riot

media:content.media:description: Sri Lanka sees deadliest prison riot in years. (Representational image)

item.description: Riots in an overcrowded prison in Sri Lanka killed 20 inmates and eight guards.
item.content:encoded: Riots in an overcrowded prison in Sri Lanka killed 20 inmates and eight guards.

item.title: Location, Global Warming: Why US, Russia And China Are All Eyeing Greenland

media:content.media:description: Greenland as a key element of world's security strategy.

item.description: Increasing international tensions, global warming and the changing world economy have put Greenland at the heart of the debate over global trade and security
item.content:encoded: Increasing international tensions, global warming and the changing world economy have put Greenland at the heart of the debate over global trade and security

item.title: "Bending Rules, Bullying Rivals": Iran Accuses US Of "Cheating" At World Cup

media:content.media:description: Iran's World Cup run ended on June 28 with third place in Group G.

item.description: The comments followed Egypt's dramatic 3-2 defeat to defending champions Argentina in the Round of 16.
item.content:encoded: The comments followed Egypt's dramatic 3-2 defeat to defending champions Argentina in the Round of 16.

item.title: Brent Price Jumps 6.3% To $78.8 A Barrel After Trump's Iran Deal Remark
item.description: The price of Brent crude oil jumped 6.3 per cent to $78.80 a barrel. US benchmark crude surged 6.4 per cent to $75.00 a barrel.
item.content:encoded: The price of Brent crude oil jumped 6.3 per cent to $78.80 a barrel. US benchmark crude surged 6.4 per cent to $75.00 a barrel.

item.title: US-Iran War Live Updates: Trump Says Iran Ceasefire 'Over', But Open To Continued Talks

media:content.media:description: The US also revoked a sanctions waiver for Iranian oil.

item.description: Iran War: The United States launched "power strikes" against Iran following a series of attacks by Tehran on commercial ships near the Strait of Hormuz.
item.content:encoded: Iran War: The United States launched "power strikes" against Iran following a series of attacks by Tehran on commercial ships near the Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: "Wasted Cause": Trump Says US Won't To "Do Any Trade Business With Spain"

media:content.media:description: Trump on Wednesday threatened to cut off trade with Spain.

item.description: Trump singled out Spain for particular criticism calling it a "terrible partner in NATO".
item.content:encoded: Trump singled out Spain for particular criticism calling it a "terrible partner in NATO".

item.title: Punjab Cop Transferred After US Charges Him In Case Linked To Indian Gangs

media:content.media:description: Nagra was was the station house officer at the Tanda police station

item.description: The cop is accused of helping gangsters extort $400,000 from a family in Los Angeles by threatening to file false murder charges against their relatives in India.
item.content:encoded: The cop is accused of helping gangsters extort $400,000 from a family in Los Angeles by threatening to file false murder charges against their relatives in India.

item.title: "It's A Waste Of Time": Trump Says US-Iran Deal To End War Is "Over"

media:content.media:description: Washington has also revoked a license authorizing the sale ofIranian oil.

item.description: Trump said that US representatives can continue negotiations but he cast doubt on the outcome. "They can talk, but I think they're wasting their time," he said.
item.content:encoded: <iframe title="Player" class="head-story__img img__full lazyload" height="300" scrolling=no frameborder=no src="about:blank" data-src="https://www.ndtv.com/video/embed-player/id/1124419/play-via-app-wap?pWidth=100&pHeight=100&embed_type=story&site=classic&autostart=1"> </iframe>Trump said that US representatives can continue negotiations but he cast doubt on the outcome. "They can talk, but I think they're wasting their time," he said.

item.title: Trump Warns Trade Cut With Spain, Renews Push For Greenland At NATO Summit

media:content.media:description: Donald Trump on Tuesday threatened to cut off trade with Spain in NATO summit, Ankara

item.description: While Trump is still smarting from the European response to his war with Iran, he still also has not dropped his desire for NATO member Denmark's territory of Greenland.
item.content:encoded: While Trump is still smarting from the European response to his war with Iran, he still also has not dropped his desire for NATO member Denmark's territory of Greenland.

item.title: French Lawmakers Back Bill Giving Police 'Benefit Of Doubt' In Shootings

media:content.media:description: The lawwas approved by 313 votes to 199 in the lower house of parliament, the National Assembly

item.description: The number of fatal shootings by police in France is among the highest in Europe and rising.
item.content:encoded: The number of fatal shootings by police in France is among the highest in Europe and rising.

item.title: Lawsuit Alleges Trump Administration Of Giving Asylum Seekers' Data To Iran

media:content.media:description: The efforts have resulted in at least three mass deportation flights of detainees bound for Iran

item.description: The US has provided "detailed information on hundreds of Iranian detainees seeking asylum," complaints Iranian American Legal Defense Fund and Public Citizen Litigation Group
item.content:encoded: The US has provided "detailed information on hundreds of Iranian detainees seeking asylum," complaints Iranian American Legal Defense Fund and Public Citizen Litigation Group

item.title: EU Court Rejects Apple Challenge To Landmark Tech Rules

media:content.media:description: Apple took its grievances to the Luxembourg-based General Court in 2024

item.description: EU's General Court has dismissed Apple's challenge against its designation as a gatekeeper for the App Store and iOS under the DMA
item.content:encoded: EU's General Court has dismissed Apple's challenge against its designation as a gatekeeper for the App Store and iOS under the DMA

item.title: PM Modi Leaves For Australia After Indonesia Visit, 14 Pacts Signed

media:content.media:description: From Indonesia, PM Modi will travel to Melbourne from July 8-10.

item.description: During the visit, PM Modi held bilateral talks with Indonesian President Prabowo Subianto, who dropped him off at the airport.
item.content:encoded: During the visit, PM Modi held bilateral talks with Indonesian President Prabowo Subianto, who dropped him off at the airport.

item.title: Pakistan Willing To Take Back Child Rapist 'Daddy' From UK, But Also Wants Munir Critics Deported

media:content.media:description: Ahmed had dual British and Pakistani citizenship before he was jailed

item.description: Pakistan has sought the extradition of Akbar, a member of former prime minister Imran Khan's cabinet, and Raja, a Pakistani journalist and ex-military officer, last December over allegations of spreading "fake news" and anti-state propaganda.
item.content:encoded: Pakistan has sought the extradition of Akbar, a member of former prime minister Imran Khan's cabinet, and Raja, a Pakistani journalist and ex-military officer, last December over allegations of spreading "fake news" and anti-state propaganda.

item.title: Inside US' 'Operation Hard Ball' Against Lawrence Bishnoi, India-Based Gangs

media:content.media:description: Lawrence Bishnoi (L) and his associate-turned-rival Jaggu Bhagwanpuria (R)

item.description: US investigators claimed Bishnoi projected himself as a "patriot," "nationalist," and "deeply religious" individual through social media and media interviews.
item.content:encoded: US investigators claimed Bishnoi projected himself as a "patriot," "nationalist," and "deeply religious" individual through social media and media interviews.

item.title: Opinion: Opinion | Pak Has A Kashmir Crisis - And It May Already Be Planning To Export It To India
item.description: The lie of 'Azad Kashmir' is fast catching up with Pakistan. But it might just use it to push India into a tough spot.
item.content:encoded: The lie of 'Azad Kashmir' is fast catching up with Pakistan. But it might just use it to push India into a tough spot.

item.title: Chinese Men Used Telegram To Share Rape Videos, Drugging Tips In Germany

media:content.media:description: Defendant covers his face as he arrives for a trial against a network of Chinese men in Germany (File)

item.description: "The perpetrators were characterised by a particular ruthlessness, an objectification of the victims, and the perfidious planning of their crimes," Frankfurt chief prosecutor Dominik Mies says.
item.content:encoded: "The perpetrators were characterised by a particular ruthlessness, an objectification of the victims, and the perfidious planning of their crimes," Frankfurt chief prosecutor Dominik Mies says.

item.title: US Court Relief For Indian-Origin Doctor Who Drove Family In Tesla Off Cliff

media:content.media:description: Dharmesh Patel (45) was charged with three counts of attempted murder.

item.description: On January 2, 2023, Patel was on a road trip with his wife and two children when he drove his white Tesla off a cliff in Northern California.
item.content:encoded: On January 2, 2023, Patel was on a road trip with his wife and two children when he drove his white Tesla off a cliff in Northern California.
